title: Callback Enabled Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that controls whether a machine emits progress or result notifications to a registered callback endpoint during or after execution.

## When to use
Enable when a long-running machine should notify an external system of completion or intermediate results without requiring the caller to poll. Disable for synchronous, request-response pipelines where callbacks add unnecessary complexity.

## Notes
Callback endpoint configuration is managed separately from this flag. Enabling callbacks requires that the runtime supports the callback mechanism and that a valid endpoint is registered. See [Stream Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:stream-flag;textable) for token-level streaming as an alternative to callbacks.
